ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flavor_combinations" (
  "flavor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flavor combination */,
  "combination_name" TEXT /* Name of the flavor combination (e.g., Cumin+ Fish) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flavor combination */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the flavor combination was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the flavor combination was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the flavor combination */,
  "approved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the flavor combination has been approved for further testing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flavor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flavor_spice_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map entry */,
  "flavor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flavor combination */,
  "spice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spice */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the spice used in the combination */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the map entry was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the map entry was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the map entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flavor_spice_map_flavor_id FOREIGN KEY ("flavor_id") REFERENCES flavor_combinations ("flavor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date the test session was conducted */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the test session was conducted */,
  "test_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the test was conducted */,
  "conducted_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who conducted the test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test session was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the test session was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the test session */,
  "approved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the test session has been approved */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the test session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test session */,
  "flavor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flavor combination */,
  "replicate_1" REAL /* Score from the first replicate */,
  "replicate_2" REAL /* Score from the second replicate */,
  "replicate_3" REAL /* Score from the third replicate */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score of the flavor combination */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test result was recorded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the test result was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who recorded the test result */,
  "evaluator_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the sensory evaluator about the test result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_flavor_id FOREIGN KEY ("flavor_id") REFERENCES flavor_combinations ("flavor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES test_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensory_evaluators" (
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensory evaluator */,
  "evaluator_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensory evaluator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sensory evaluator */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the evaluator was added to the database */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the evaluator information was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who added the evaluator */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any certifications the evaluator holds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_evaluators" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test session */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensory evaluator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the map entry was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the map entry was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the map entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_evaluators_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES sensory_evaluators ("evaluator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_evaluators_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES test_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "lead_researcher" TEXT /* Name of the lead researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the project information was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_sessions" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the map entry was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the map entry was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the map entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_sessions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES test_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_sessions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account information was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date and time of the last password change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_projects" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the map entry was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the map entry was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the map entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project or session */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test session being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project or session was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES test_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., report, data) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the file was uploaded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the file was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
